summary: Staggered kinetic drop-bounce text effect component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-kinetic-bounce/src/TitleKineticBounce.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleKineticBounce` and `titleKineticBounceDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleKineticBounce` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Kinetic Bounce Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-kinetic-bounce to my project. Preserve the exported TitleKineticBounceProps API and register the TitleKineticBounce composition with the default props.
